revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-11 01:45:46 on [[Template:Geonames link/doc]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == 
{{geonameslink |gnid= |name= }}
==Example== {{nowiki template demo|code=[{{geonameslink|gnid=2082960|name=yellow%20river}} Yellow River] in [{{geonamesabout}} Geonames.org (cc-by)]}} ==See also== * {{tl|geonamesabout}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Geography external link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Geonames_link%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == 
{{geonameslink |gnid= |name= }}
==Example== {{nowiki template demo|code=[{{geonameslink|gnid=2082960|name=yellow%20river}} Yellow River] in [{{geonamesabout}} Geonames.org (cc-by)]}} ==See also== * {{tl|geonamesabout}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Geography external link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]

==Example== {{nowiki template demo|code=[{{geonameslink|gnid=2082960|name=yellow%20river}} Yellow River] in [{{geonamesabout}} Geonames.org (cc-by)]}} ==See also== * {{tl|geonamesabout}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Geography external link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
